features.name: module instantiation with register in posedge block
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the child module contains a register assigned in an always @(posedge clock) block
features.snippet: module CPU(input wire clock, cpu_reset); reg reset_r; always @(posedge clock) begin reset_r <= cpu_reset; end endmodule

features.name: wire assigned from register in port expression
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned from a register in a parent module, connected to a child module port through a combinational OR expression

features.name: multi-stage register pipeline with reset
features.description: Code should include a chain of three or more registers where each is assigned from the previous one in an always @(posedge clock) block with reset assignment
features.snippet: reg sync_0, sync_1, sync_2; always @(posedge clock) begin sync_0 <= sync_1; sync_1 <= sync_2; sync_2 <= reset; end

features.name: trace compilation with -O0 optimization
features.description: Code should include a design that when compiled with tracing enabled (--trace) and -O0 flag triggers a hang
